signup.title: Create Your Account
signup.subtitle: Join Gaza Tech Market in just a few steps
signup.newsletter: Send me exclusive deals, product updates, and tech news via email
signup.securityDescription: We use industry-standard encryption to protect your personal information. Your data will never be shared with third parties without your consent.

toast.success: Account created successfully! Please verify your email.

validation.firstNameLettersOnly: First name must contain only letters
validation.lastNameLettersOnly: Last name must contain only letters
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.termsRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions

verifyEmail.title: Verify Your Email
verifyEmail.subtitle: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to
verifyEmail.checkInboxDescription: Please enter the code we sent to your email address. The code will expire in 10 minutes.
verifyEmail.checkSpamOrResend: Check your spam folder or request a new code
verifyEmail.codeResentDescription: A new verification code has been sent to your email.
verifyEmail.tip1: Check your spam or junk folder if you don't see the email in your inbox
verifyEmail.tip2: Make sure you entered the correct email address during signup
verifyEmail.tip3: Wait a few minutes - email delivery can sometimes be delayed
verifyEmail.tip4: Contact support if you continue having issues with verification
verifyEmail.securityNoticeDescription: Never share your verification code with anyone. Gaza Tech Market will never ask for your code via phone or email.

basicInfo.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your product in detail — condition, features, and why someone should buy it...

toast.updateSuccess: Your listing has been updated successfully!

validation.titleMin: Title must be at least 10 characters long
validation.descriptionMin: Description must be at least 20 characters long
validation.priceRequired: Price must be a valid number
validation.priceMin: Price cannot be zero or negative
validation.productConditionRequired: Please select a valid product condition
validation.imageMinSize: File size must be at least 10KB
validation.imageMaxSize: File size must be less than 2MB
validation.imageInvalidType: Invalid file type. Only JPG, JPEG, PNG, WEBP and GIF are allowed.
validation.imagesRequired: Please upload at least one image
validation.imagesMax: You can upload a maximum of 5 images

page.title: Seller Verification
page.subtitle: Complete the steps below to get your seller badge and build trust with buyers.

personalInfo.title: Personal Information
personalInfo.subtitle: Please provide your accurate personal details
personalInfo.banner: We verify all sellers to ensure a safe marketplace. Your information is encrypted and secure.
personalInfo.fullNamePlaceholder: As it appears on your ID

documentUpload.title: Document Upload
documentUpload.subtitle: Upload clear photos of your identification documents
documentUpload.banner: Ensure all text is clearly visible. Accepted formats: JPG, PNG (max 2MB each). Your face and ID must be clearly visible in the selfie.
documentUpload.frontDescription: Upload a clear photo of the front side of your ID
documentUpload.backDescription: Upload a clear photo of the back side of your ID
documentUpload.selfieDescription: Hold your ID next to your face — both must be clearly visible

phoneVerification.title: Phone Verification
phoneVerification.subtitle: Verify your phone number to complete seller verification
phoneVerification.banner: Enter your phone number below. A one-time code will be sent via SMS. Once verified, your number is saved to your profile.
phoneVerification.hint: Use international format starting with your country code (e.g. +970 for Palestine).

terms.text: I confirm that all information and documents provided are accurate and authentic. I understand that providing false information may result in permanent account suspension.

validation.fullNameMin: Full name must be at least 3 characters
validation.nationalIdLength: National ID must be exactly 8 digits
validation.addressMin: Address must be at least 5 characters
validation.documentFrontRequired: Please upload the front side of your ID
validation.documentBackRequired: Please upload the back side of your ID
validation.selfieRequired: Please upload a selfie with your ID
validation.phoneInvalidFormat: Phone number must start with +970 or +972 followed by 9 digits
validation.whatsappInvalidFormat: WhatsApp number must start with +970 or +972 followed by 9 digits
validation.phoneVerificationRequired: You must verify your phone number before submitting
validation.termsRequired: You must confirm that all information is accurate
